# CWE-459 positive: temp ledger export never deleted (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-459-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

func ExportLedgerCSV(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	f, err := os.CreateTemp("", "ledger-*.csv")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	rows, _ := db.Query("SELECT account, balance FROM ledger")
	for rows.Next() {
		var account string
		var balance float64
		_ = rows.Scan(&account, &balance)
		_, _ = fmt.Fprintf(f, "%s,%s\n", account, r.URL.Query().Get("mask"))
	}
	_ = rows.Close()
	http.ServeFile(w, r, f.Name())
}
